code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line() when Some(s) s when None "" end
let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
let n = words.len()
while i < n
  let w = match words.get(i) when Some(s) s when None "" end
  let wlen = string.len(w)
  mut transformed = w
  if wlen > 0
    let b = match string.byte_at(w, 0) when Some(x) x when None 0 end
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = b - 32
      let rest = string.substring(w, 1, wlen)
      transformed = "#{string.from_byte(upper)}#{rest}"
    end
  end
  if i == 0
    result = transformed
  else
    result = "#{result} #{transformed}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(result)
